Notes: * Senior Day at NJCU for Alnisa Hernaiz
* NJCU is eliminated from NJAC Tournament contention with the loss.
* TCNJ clinches the No. 2 seed in the NJAC Tournament with the win.

Game.Officials: Robert Csigi,  Leslie Porchen,  Robert Solomon
